com.datecs.rfid

Class RFID

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.datecs.rfid.RFID
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    RC663

    public abstract class RFID
extends java.lang.Object
    Class that represents RFID module.

      • setDebug

        public static void setDebug(boolean on)
        Turn on/off debugging.

        on - the debugging state.

      • onDataReceived

        protected abstract void onDataReceived(byte[] data,
                                       int size)
        Abstract method that is called when data is received.
        Parameters:
        data - data buffer.
        size - data size.

      • writeBlock

        protected void writeBlock(byte[] b,
                          int offset,
                          int length)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Writes length bytes from the specified byte array to this printer.
        Parameters:
        b - byte array.
        offset - data offset.
        length - data length.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
